---
title: "Contact"
output: html_document
---

# Contact

I work with a small number of teams at a time to ensure depth, speed, and decision impact.

## Book a Decision Call {#book}
- **20 minutes** to clarify your decision, timeline, and whether a sprint or validation is the right fit.  
- Use my scheduling link:

<p>
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="zzzz" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Schedule via Calendly</a>
  <a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg" href="mailto:aa@gmail.com">Email: aa@gmail.com</a>
</p>

**Email:** <a href="mailto:aa@gmail.com">aa@gmail.com</a>  
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/nhannguyen  
**GitHub:** https://github.com/NhanNguyen000  

> Prefer email? Send 3 bullet points: decision context, datasets in scope, target timeline.
